purpose: Current production bundle debt ceiling. The measured v3.51.19 exact members_invite UI boundary produces 4,554,116 raw / 1,304,445 gzip JavaScript bytes: +332 raw / +23 gzip versus the reviewed v3.51.18 artifact. The increase is limited to the shared fail-closed invitation decision, entitlement-loss dialog reset and propagation to both invitation entry points; no dependency was added. Only the raw total ceiling advances by that reviewed delta while retaining the existing 128-byte cross-platform/SHA allowance. The previous gzip, largest-file and CSS ceilings remain unchanged because the current artifact still fits them. Further increases require an explicit reviewed baseline update.
